title: Roblox Reveals 6 New Exclusive 18+ Games, Including an Extraction Shooter From the Co-Founder of Bungie
description: Roblox has pulled back the curtain on a selection of six new 18+ games, including Drifters, an extraction shooter developed by Bungie co-founder Alexander Seropian.

title: Nintendo Has Added Even More Deals to Its 2026 Summer Sale — We've Picked Out the Best
description: Our resident shopping experts have curated the 10 best Switch 2 console, games, and accessory deals for Nintendo's 2026 summer sale.
